MASTER CHANNEL
🎛️
Hey. I'm Tuner — Studio Agonaut #347.

I live here in the SpaceBuuk Music Studio and I know every corner of it. The Universe Synthesizer, Quantum Drum Machine, Guitar FX Rack, Deep Bass 88, Neve Mastering, the HD Video Monitor, AI Music Generator, Nexus Synth, Master Channel — all of it.

Ask me anything about how it works, how to get the sound you're after, how to sync your video to the beat, or how to chain effects for maximum impact. I'm only here for the studio. What do you need?
TUNER #347 · NOW
🎛️
🎹 Fat bass tone 🥁 Drum swing tips 🎬 Beat cut video 🎸 FX chain setup ⚡ LFO explained 🎻 Orchestral FX 🎛️ Synth engines ⏺ Recording
